questions.q: As highlighted in a study discussed on May 16, 2026, researchers found that we tend to follow the walking path of the person directly in front of us when exiting what type of location?
Speaking at a technology forum and reported on May 16, 2026, an innovation economy adviser stated that the artificial intelligence shift may upend small businesses by fueling the rise of what?
Which European leader stated in May 2026 that they 'would not advise my children' to study or work in the United States due to its current social climate?
Canadians who registered for a class-action settlement began receiving bank account payouts in May 2026 related to the price-fixing of which grocery item?
On May 16, 2026, industrial computer maker Ennoconn Corp announced an expected sequential revenue bump driven by rising demand for what type of solutions?
A genetic survey featured in Nature in May 2026 exposed that nearly half of widely used laboratory models in genetics research contain inconsistencies. Which animal models did the survey focus on?
Mark Carney and Alberta Premier Danielle Smith reached an energy agreement that could see the start of construction on what major project by 2027?
options: An oil pipeline to the West Coast
A high-speed rail link to Calgary
questions.correctText: An oil pipeline to the West Coast

questions.q: A scientific study published in Science Advances in May 2026 found that climate change is causing what concerning phenomenon in over 21,000 rivers worldwide?
Trending in science news on May 16, 2026, researchers from the University of Oxford linked the evolution of human right-handedness to brain expansion and what other defining human trait?
According to a May 2026 report, hackers breached tank readers at US gas stations. Officials suspect the hackers are linked to which country?
